name: coSetBlockSize
title: coSetBlockSize
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coSetBlockSize( dword blockSize, dword errCode[] );
This function sets the block size that is used for SDO block transfers. The default value is 7 and applies globally for all SDO transmission.
blockSize Block size to be used for SDO block transfers, 1..127
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];coSetBlockSize( 14, errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "SDO block size successfully set" ); }
